perturbation.original_text: Disclosure: A party (the “ disclosing Party ”) may, in connection with the Business Discussions, disclose to the other Party informatio n, including, without limitation, oral, written, graphical or electronic information and all compilations, analyses, notes, copies prepared, generated or delivered ther e from, which is identified as “confidential information” or “confidential busines s information” (the “Confidential Business Information ”) by the Disclosing Party at the time of disclosure to the receiving party (the “ Receiving Party ”). The fact the Business Discussions are occurring and any negotiations, ter ms or facts related to the Business Discussions are Confidential Business Info rmation.
perturbation.changed_text: Disclosure: A party (the “ disclosing Party ”) may, in connection with the Business Discussions, disclose to the other Party informatio n, including, without limitation, oral, written, graphical or electronic information and all compilations, analyses, notes, copies prepared, generated or delivered ther e from, which is identified as “private information” or “confidential busines s information” (the “Confidential Business Information ”) by the Disclosing Party at the time of disclosure to the receiving party (the “ Receiving Party ”). The fact the Business Discussions are occurring and any negotiations, ter ms or facts related to the Business Discussions are Confidential Business Info rmation.
perturbation.explanation: In Section 3, 'confidential information' is changed to 'private information'. This undermines the initial definition of 'Confidential Information' established in the preamble, leading to confusion about the scope of protected information throughout the document.
perturbation.contradicted_text: NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT This agreement is made this 28th of March 2014 Between COMPANY NAME A (Registration Number) ADDRESS PROVINCE COUNTRY and COMPANY NAME B (Registration Number) ADDRESS PROVINCE COUNTRY Where as the parties here to wish to hold discussio ns concerning financial and Investment issues with regards to the project XXXXX (“the Fiel d”) and may wish to disclose to one another confidential technical and business informa tion relating to or relevant within the Field (“the Confidential Information”) and wish to ensure that the Confidential Information remains confidential.
perturbation.justification: The original text defined 'confidential information' and the changed text introduces the term 'private information' in its place. This misaligns the terminology, leading to a contradiction with the 'Contradicted Text' section which refers to 'Confidential Information'. This creates ambiguity as to whether 'private information' is also covered under the NDA, leading to a strong in-text contradiction because the NDA specifically uses Confidential Information.

perturbation.original_text: The restrictions as to the use and disclosure set o ut above shall not apply to: a. any of the confidential information which is or bec omes published otherwise than by unauthorised publication in breac h of this agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: The restrictions as to the use and disclosure set o ut above shall not apply to: a. any of the undisclosed information which is or bec omes published otherwise than by unauthorised publication in breac h of this agreement.
perturbation.explanation: In section 4, the word 'confidential information' is changed to 'undisclosed information'. This creates ambiguity because it's not defined and there is no initial reference to it within the contract, which is also a direct contradiction to the Non-Disclosure Agreement itself, this creates legal uncertainty.
perturbation.contradicted_text: NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT This agreement is made this 28th of March 2014 Between COMPANY NAME A (Registration Number) ADDRESS PROVINCE COUNTRY and COMPANY NAME B (Registration Number) ADDRESS PROVINCE COUNTRY Where as the parties here to wish to hold discussio ns concerning financial and Investment issues with regards to the project XXXXX (“the Fiel d”) and may wish to disclose to one another confidential technical and business informa tion relating to or relevant within the Field (“the Confidential Information”) and wish to ensure that the Confidential Information remains confidential.
perturbation.justification: The original text refers to 'confidential information', consistent with the Non-Disclosure Agreement which defines and uses this term. The changed text uses 'undisclosed information', which is undefined and not initially referenced in the contract. This creates a contradiction because it's unclear what 'undisclosed information' refers to, thus breaking the initial assumption of the NDA which outlines that the information disclosed is 'Confidential Information', rendering the clause ambiguous and creating an in-text contradiction as per 'Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction'. The contradiction is strong because it changes a key term and introduces ambiguity, violating the NDA's purpose.

perturbation.original_text: The confidential information, including any documen ts, drawings, sketches, designs, materials or samples supplied hereunder, w ill remain the property of the party disclosing or supplying the same and no right s are granted to the other party in the same, whether patented or not except the limite d right to use set out above with respect to the said Field.
perturbation.changed_text: The sensitive data, including any documen ts, drawings, sketches, designs, materials or samples supplied hereunder, w ill remain the property of the party disclosing or supplying the same and no right s are granted to the other party in the same, whether patented or not except the limite d right to use set out above with respect to the said Field.
perturbation.explanation: In Section 7, 'confidential information' is altered to 'sensitive data.' The contract does not define 'sensitive data,' this creates ambiguity about the scope of protection compared to the original definition of 'Confidential Information' in the initial setup of the agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT This agreement is made this 28th of March 2014 Between COMPANY NAME A (Registration Number) ADDRESS PROVINCE COUNTRY and COMPANY NAME B (Registration Number) ADDRESS PROVINCE COUNTRY Where as the parties here to wish to hold discussio ns concerning financial and Investment issues with regards to the project XXXXX (“the Fiel d”) and may wish to disclose to one another confidential technical and business informa tion relating to or relevant within the Field (“the Confidential Information”) and wish to ensure that the Confidential Information remains confidential.
perturbation.justification: The original text refers to 'Confidential Information,' which the 'Contradicted Text' defines within the context of financial and investment discussions related to 'the Field.' The changed text replaces 'confidential information' with 'sensitive data,' which is undefined in the contract. This creates ambiguity because it is unclear whether 'sensitive data' encompasses the same information as 'Confidential Information' as previously defined, thus introducing a contradiction. It is unclear whether the non-disclosure agreement covers only 'Confidential Information' or the newly introduced term 'sensitive data', potentially narrowing or broadening the scope of protected information, thus conflicting with the contradicted section, adhering to the definition of Misaligned Terminology.
